title: Anter
overview: The famous knight Antarah Ibn Shaddad faces a new adventure as the father of his beloved Abla sets a harsh condition to approve their marriage. To be able to marry Abla, Antarah must get the golden dress that belongs to the lady of the Enchanted Palace, located in the Romans' country.
